citations.quote: This email contains a copy of the Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct

findings.text: NAP-SRC-0029 is an email from Edinburgh Napier University accommodation to Anfal Elbushra dated 12 March 2026, with a 3 MB attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf'.
The email states it contains a copy of the Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct and requests the recipient to read and electronically sign the tenancy agreement.
The extraction artifact art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0029 contains only the email body text; the binary content of the attached Student Licence PDF was not extracted by the pdf_text method.

No tool configured for binary attachment extraction from PDF is available in this task. A follow-up task is needed to extract the attached Student Licence PDF using a tool that can parse PDF attachments.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Binary Extraction Report for NAP-SRC-0029

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0029 (Email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra, 12 March 2026)

**Attachment Identified:** 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB)

**Extraction Status:** The email body text was successfully extracted via pdf_text. However, the binary content of the attached Student Licence PDF was not extracted because the pdf_text method does not handle PDF attachments.

**Recommendation:** Use a tool capable of extracting attachments from PDF files (e.g., pdftk, or a Python script with PyPDF2/pdfplumber) to retrieve the Student Licence PDF for further analysis.
proposed_artifacts.title: Binary Extraction Report for NAP-SRC-0029

proposed_tasks.instructions: Extract the binary attachment 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from the source PDF NAP-SRC-0029. Use a tool capable of parsing PDF attachments (e.g., pdftk, or a Python script with PyPDF2/pdfplumber). Save the extracted PDF as a new source file in the matter's source directory and register it in the file inventory. Then perform text extraction on the extracted PDF to obtain its contents.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract Student Licence PDF attachment from NAP-SRC-0029

risk_flags.description: The Student Licence PDF attachment was not extracted; its terms and conditions are unavailable for review.

summary: Extracted text from NAP-SRC-0029 confirms an email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra attaching a PDF titled 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf'. The email references a tenancy agreement and code of conduct but does not contain the binary content of the attached PDF. The extraction artifact (art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0029) is text-only; the binary Student Licence PDF was not extracted. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the binary attachment using a tool capable of handling PDF attachments.

uncertainties.reason: The binary Student Licence PDF attachment was not extracted; its contents remain unknown.
No tool for binary attachment extraction is available in the current task context.
